headline: NVIDIA And SLB Target Energy AI Factories As Shares Pull Back
summary: NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) and SLB are expanding their AI infrastructure and model collaboration for the energy sector. The partners are developing modular AI factories and industrial-scale agentic AI solutions designed for energy companies. The effort focuses on turning operational and energy specific data into actionable insights that can support lower carbon operations. NVIDIA, trading at $178.665, is extending its AI reach into energy through this deeper collaboration with SLB, a major...
